title: Exact age remains unresolved and casting uses an adult performer
source_observation: The text presents Manimekalai as a young woman but current research has not established one verified numerical age
risk: Publicity may invent an exact age or production may place a minor performer in coercive pursuit and confinement material
decision: Do not state an exact age before philological review and cast an adult performer for the principal role
rationale: Protects textual honesty and performer safeguarding

title: Central arc moves from defensive refusal to chosen obligation
source_observation: Manimekalai rejects an assigned future and later accepts feeding inquiry and discipline
risk: The character could remain reactive or be treated as passively carried by sacred events
decision: Structure the arc so refusal protects autonomy while chosen service and inquiry create mature agency
rationale: Gives the protagonist active development without weakening renunciation
required_review: Screenplay; classical Tamil; gender studies; director

title: Compassion includes fear anger fatigue and grief
source_observation: The narrative places Manimekalai inside pursuit public service death confinement famine and philosophical struggle
risk: A saintly performance could erase human cost and make compassion emotionally inert
decision: Allow fear anger exhaustion grief and uncertainty while showing compassion as repeated disciplined action
rationale: Makes ethical growth playable and prevents devotional flattening
required_review: Actor preparation; trauma review; Buddhist studies; director

title: Revelation does not create instant omniscience
source_observation: Manipallavam supplies past-life and sacred knowledge before later reasoning instruction
risk: The heroine could speak with complete doctrinal authority before earning intellectual development
decision: Preserve disorientation partial understanding questions correction and knowledge continuity across acts
rationale: Protects dramatic progression from revelation to disciplined inquiry
required_review: Classical Tamil; Buddhist studies; dialogue; continuity

title: Supernatural abilities reject superhero grammar
source_observation: The epic includes divine transport memory protective formulae transformations and an inexhaustible vessel
risk: Spectacle could remove bodily vulnerability responsibility and institutional stakes
decision: Give each capacity distinct limits consequences and emotional effects and never use magic to erase labour blame or fear
rationale: Keeps the sacred world serious and aligned with the epic's moral centre
required_review: VFX; screenplay; stunt; religious studies; publicity

title: Previous-life memory does not erase the present self
source_observation: Past births explain relationships and causation but Manimekalai continues to make choices in her current life
risk: The character could become only the continuation of an earlier identity or romance
decision: Treat memory as inherited knowledge that complicates but does not overrule present consent identity or responsibility
rationale: Preserves present autonomy and dramatic accountability
required_review: Buddhist studies; classical Tamil; gender studies; screenplay

title: Voice evolves from protective economy to disciplined inquiry
source_observation: Her situations move from dangerous public scrutiny to service confrontation and philosophical study
risk: One uniform wise poetic voice would erase age development and context
decision: Use short guarded speech in early danger operational clarity in service moral precision after tragedy and structured questions in the final act
rationale: Makes intellectual and emotional growth audible
required_review: Dialogue; actor preparation; classical Tamil; editor

title: Body retains artistic household history
source_observation: Manimekalai grows within Madhavi's trained performance environment even while rejecting the assigned profession
risk: Renunciation could be represented as complete bodily amnesia or the film could falsely give her modern recital choreography
decision: Retain plausible rhythm balance spatial intelligence and controlled gesture without claiming unsupported professional mastery or modern Bharatanatyam form
rationale: Connects lineage to performance while respecting uncertainty
required_review: Performance history; movement coach; classical Tamil; choreography

title: Service has bodily and institutional cost
source_observation: The vessel is inexhaustible but feeding depends on repeated handling crowd care water sanitation and organisation
risk: The heroine could appear effortlessly benevolent while invisible workers carry all cost
decision: Show fatigue learning mistakes coordination and dependence on other workers and recipients
rationale: Turns compassion into social practice rather than magical image
required_review: Food service; public health; actor continuity; crowd direction

title: Ending represents continuing practice not emotional extinction
source_observation: The final chapters move toward disciplined understanding and release without proving that the living character becomes an empty icon
risk: The ending could freeze her into colourless silence or imply that liberation means no further feeling or relation
decision: End with earned alert stillness and continuing ethical practice rather than vacancy final perfection or withdrawal from embodied life
rationale: Preserves openness and the character's accumulated relationships
required_review: Buddhist studies; classical Tamil; director; editor; performance
